title: Iran delivers revised/modified proposal to US via Pakistan mediators — enrichment remains key sticking point
snippet: Iran delivered its response to the latest U.S. suggestions via Pakistani mediators on May 18. Washington's central demands include a 20-year moratorium on uranium enrichment and the transfer abroad of Iran's stockpile of roughly 400kg enriched to 60%. Iran's modified proposal addresses some concerns but enrichment remains the fundamental sticking point. Pakistan transmitted the document to Washington, continuing its role as shuttle mediator.
tag_reason: 신규 — 5/18 이란 수정안 전달은 이전 협상 교착(src-1156) 이후의 새로운 외교적 진전
